response.justification: Over 15 years of full-stack engineering experience with direct, current exposure to the primary stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, and MongoDB — plus active AI-agent and MCP framework work in the current role at re:cinq. The candidate has demonstrated end-to-end ownership across high-throughput systems, developer tooling, and open-source infrastructure, with a consistent track record of craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, code review) that maps tightly to the role's responsibilities.
strengths: Deep, multi-year TypeScript/Node.js/React experience with measurable production scale (millions of mails, millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Current hands-on AI agent and MCP framework development directly satisfies the role's AI agent requirement
Strong testing culture — authored open-source testing frameworks and test runners, signals genuine testing depth beyond tool familiarity
concerns: NestJS not explicitly mentioned anywhere in the resume, despite being the primary backend framework in the stack
Kotlin experience absent; Java appears only in peripheral contexts (robotic arms, mobile orchestration tooling) rather than production backend services
PostgreSQL not called out explicitly; relational database depth is harder to assess from the resume, which leans heavily on MongoDB

key_factors.factor: AI agent and developer tooling experience
